case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK USA NA VS. JIAN Z CHEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA NA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK USA NA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN Z AN INDIVIDUAL $1,722.14 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,765.74 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,137.88, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JIAN Z AN INDIVIDUAL

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
